title: API Container State.Health must be ommited if empty for Docker compat
body:
### Issue Description

Podman API provide State.Health with empty values for running containers without healthcheck, when Docker [ommit](https://github.com/moby/moby/blob/1a7969545d73537545645f5cd2c79b7a77e7d39f/api/types/types.go#L430) it. Some software rely on Docker's behaviour, for example Uptime Kuma. [Issue](https://github.com/louislam/uptime-kuma/issues/3767). TcpDump attached. 

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. `podman run --rm --name alpine -it alpine`
2. another pane `podman inspect alpine`



### Describe the results you received

Healthcheck don't configured and State.Health present

### Describe the results you expected

State.Health dont present

### podman info output

```yaml
podman version 4.6.2
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

_No response_

### Additional information

comments.body:
This is a repeat of https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/18792 which is tagged for v5.0. @mheon can you close this? 

Original PR for context: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/18807
